business_justification: Discount requested to support budget constraints while expanding platform adoption across an additional business unit.

Customer is requesting improved pricing to align with a competitive renewal and secure a multi-year commitment. Customer is requesting renewal flexibility and pricing protection to reduce long-term budget risk while protecting the renewal path.

Customer is consolidating spend and asking for improved terms in exchange for a larger annual commitment. Customer is requesting advance notice and approval for overages to support demand planning and avoid unbudgeted consumption charges.

Pricing support is requested to win a strategic new logo with strong long-term expansion potential. Customer is requesting prior approval over publicity and reference rights so the commercial team can preserve the relationship while still exploring future reference value.
